mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND (username = #{account} OR email = #{account} OR phone = #{account})
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
